/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libiiHtmlBlock.so -o libiiHtmlBlock.so CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/iiHtmlBlock_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/iiHtmlBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Parser/GetHTML.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Parser/GetTagInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/BlockHTMLSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/BlockRangeTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/DivideBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/DeleteBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/CombineBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/FlattenBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iiHtmlBlock.dir/Src/Modifier/iiXmlToHTML.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ymy/.local/iiXml/lib:/home/ymy/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib: /home/ymy/.local/iiXml/lib/libiiXml.so /home/ymy/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3
